name: clarity-agent-cli
description: CLI and broker interface for Human-in-the-Loop workflows across Clarity agents

scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && clarityc pack clarity/main.clarity -f main -o dist/clarity-agent.cjs && clarityc pack clarity/claritycli.clarity -f main -o dist/claritycli.cjs && chmod +x dist/clarity-agent.cjs dist/claritycli.cjs
